title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Kansai Nerolac

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Kansai Nerolac
jsonLd.description:
We at Kansai Nerolac are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kansai Nerolac:
Kansai Nerolac is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kansai Nerolac!
